title: Psychological Drama ‘Crowbar’ Sets Cast: Patrick Walker, John Pyper-Ferguson and Emma Kenne Lead Jordan Tortorello’s Film (EXCLUSIVE)
content:
ByWilliam Earl

The upcoming psychological drama “Crowbar” has set its cast.

Patrick Walker(“Lessons in Chemistry”),John Pyper-Ferguson(“Suits”) and Emma Kenney (“Shameless”) are set to star inJordan Tortorello’s “Crowbar.” Rafael Cebrián (“Narcos”), Josh Sussman (“Glee”), Briana Price (“Divorced Sistas”), Briana Cuoco, Toby Hemingway and Mikayla Lashae Bartholomew also star in the film.

Per the press release, the film is about “Levi (Walker), a struggling actor, lands the lead role in ‘Bradshaw’ — a psychological war drama shot inside his own home. As the crew invades his space and a volatile director (Pyper-Ferguson) pushes him to his limits the line between Levi and his character dissolves. Haunted by grief, isolation and paranoia he spirals into a breakdown — leaving audiences questioning what was real, what was performance and whether the movie was ever really about Michael Bradshaw at all.”

Production on the film has wrapped in Burbank, California. It is Tortorello’s directorial debut, and he’s also a producer through his MixedMedia banner. Brad Rundblade and Patrick Walker, who wrote the film with Tortorello, are also producers. Chris Tortorello and Beth Tortorello serve as executive producers, with Penny Sandzimier as line producer and Sami Tortorello and Joe Bohn as associate producers. Lauren and Jordan Bass, CSA, were in charge of casting through Bass Casting.

“‘Crowbar’ is an incredibly personal film about identity pressure and what happens when the lines between performance and reality completely break down,” Jordan Tortorello said in a statement. “Built completely independently and self-financed from the ground up, this project is a testament to what happens when passionate like-minded people come together to create their own opportunities.”

Walker is repped by Unbreakable Entertainment, Gersh and attorney John Meigs. Pyper-Ferguson is repped by Talentworks. Kenney is repped by Allison Band at Gersh and Mike Gillespie at Brave Artists Management. Serbian is repped by Innovative Artists, Strand Entertainment and TFG PR. Sussman is repped by ATB & The Michael Abrams Group. Price is repped by Thruline.
title_zh: 心理劇《撬棍(Crowbar)》確定演員陣容：帕特里克·沃克(Patrick Walker)、約翰·派柏·費格森(John Pyper-Ferguson) 和艾瑪·肯尼(Emma Kenne) 主演喬丹·托托雷洛(Jordan Tortorello) 的電影（獨家報導）
content_zh:
由威廉·厄爾(William Earl)報導

即將上映的心理劇《撬棍》(Crowbar) 已經確定了演員陣容。

帕特里克·沃克(Patrick Walker)（《化學課》(Lessons in Chemistry)）、約翰·派柏·費格森(John Pyper-Ferguson)（《西裝》(Suits)）和艾瑪·肯尼(Emma Kenney)（《無恥之徒》(Shameless)）將主演喬丹·托托雷洛(Jordan Tortorello)的《撬棍》。拉斐爾·塞布里安(Rafael Cebrián)（《毒梟》(Narcos)）、喬希·薩斯曼(Josh Sussman)（《歡樂合唱團》(Glee)）、布里安娜·普賴斯(Briana Price)（《離婚姐妹》(Divorced Sistas)）、布里安娜·庫奧科(Briana Cuoco)、托比·海明威(Toby Hemingway)和米凱拉·拉謝·巴索洛繆(Mikayla Lashae Bartholomew)也將參演該片。

根據新聞稿，這部電影講述的是「萊維(沃克)是一名掙扎中的演員，獲得了在《布拉德肖》(Bradshaw)中的主角角色——這是一部在他自己家中拍攝的心理戰爭劇。隨著劇組侵入他的私人空間，一位情緒不穩的導演(派柏·費格森)將他推向極限，萊維與他的角色之間的界限逐漸模糊。在悲傷、孤獨和偏執的困擾下，他陷入崩潰——讓觀眾質疑什麼是真實，什麼是表演，這部電影是否真的與邁克爾·布拉德肖(Michael Bradshaw)有關。」

該片的拍攝已在加利福尼亞州伯班克完成。這是托托雷洛的導演處女作，他也是通過其MixedMedia公司擔任製片人。與托托雷洛共同編劇的布拉德·朗德布雷德(Brad Rundblade)和帕特里克·沃克也擔任製片人。克里斯·托托雷洛(Chris Tortorello)和貝絲·托托雷洛(Beth Tortorello)擔任執行製片人，佩妮·桑茲米爾(Penny Sandzimier)擔任製片，薩米·托托雷洛(Sami Tortorello)和喬·博恩(Joe Bohn)擔任聯合製片人。勞倫(Lauren)和喬丹·巴斯(Jordan Bass)，CSA，負責選角工作。

「《撬棍》是一部關於身份壓力的極具個人色彩的電影，探討了當表演與現實之間的界限完全崩潰時會發生什麼。」喬丹·托托雷洛在聲明中表示。「這個項目完全獨立製作並自籌資金，是熱情相投的人們聚集在一起創造自己機會的見證。」

沃克由不屈娛樂(Unbreakable Entertainment)、格什(Gersh)和律師約翰·梅格斯(John Meigs)代理。派柏·費格森由Talentworks代理。肯尼由格什的艾莉森·班德(Allison Band)和勇敢藝術管理公司的邁克·吉萊斯比(Mike Gillespie)代理。塞爾比安由創新藝術(Innovative Artists)、斯特蘭德娛樂(Strand Entertainment)和TFG PR代理。薩斯曼由ATB & The Michael Abrams Group代理。普賴斯由Thruline代理。
